description: A cadastral land-parcel diagram showing a quadrilateral (parallelogram-shaped) plot outlined with solid black borders, containing the printed number '651' in its center. A dashed line runs along the left edge (indicating an undefined or road boundary), and the right edge abuts another parcel labeled '2'. This is a typical element of a German Flurkarte (land registry map) or similar parcel plan.
position: left-center of the page, part of a larger cadastral/parcel map with adjacent plots
